        public static TTarget MapTo<TTarget>(this global::Demo.Src source)

            if (source is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));
            if (typeof(TTarget) == typeof(global::Demo.Dto)) return (TTarget)(object)ToDto(source);

        {
            if (source is null) throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));
            return new global::Demo.Dto
            {
                Xs = __DwarfMapColl_304629b4(source.Xs),
            };
        }

    private static global::System.Collections.Generic.List<long> __DwarfMapColl_304629b4(global::System.Collections.Generic.List<int> s)
    {
        if (s is null) return new global::System.Collections.Generic.List<long>();
        var __r = new global::System.Collections.Generic.List<long>(s.Count);
        foreach (var x in s) __r.Add(x);
        return __r;
